channel.title: Emotions on TheKonnecting
channel.description: Recent content in Emotions on TheKonnecting

item.title: The Burning Flowers
item.description:
You’re burning in heart Slow and steady; Just like at those flowers In my hands, they were ready.

I can see you Through the smoke, You are no longer there And something in me broke.

I’ll wait as long as I can I don’t know why. You were my moon & my stars When I dismiss you, I’ll look at the sky.

— Aish.kat
